item.title: Blackstone Group
item.summary: News value Update timeline; public information only.

updates.event: Blackstone's Q2 distributable earnings reached $1.98 billion, up 26% year-over-year, driven by gains from AI-related investments.

evidence.source_quote: 黑石第二季度可分配收益大涨26%，达到19.8亿美元

updates.event: Blackstone's profit growth was driven by AI-related investments across U.S. AI infrastructure, covering private equity, private credit, and real estate.
updates.after_state: "AI-related investments across U.S. AI infrastructure covering private equity, private credit, and real estate"

evidence.source_quote: 公司在全美大范围人工智能基建赛道的多板块投资兑现收益，利好覆盖私募股权、私募信贷、不动产等全部核心业务板块
